testCases.query: Extract the design tokens from this screenshot /tmp/screenshot.png
expectedBehavior: Reads the screenshot using multimodal analysis
Extracts colors with both hex and oklch equivalents
Identifies typography families, weights, and size scale
Asks user for output format (Tailwind, W3C, CSS variables, Markdown)

testCases.query: What colors and fonts does https://example.com use?
expectedBehavior: Uses Stitch MCP if available, falls back to WebFetch if not
Extracts color palette, typography, and spacing tokens from the URL
Produces three-tier token hierarchy (global, alias, component)
Includes oklch conversion for all extracted colors

testCases.query: Create a design system from our current project styles
expectedBehavior: Scans project for tailwind.config, tokens.css, theme files, and CSS files
Reads and analyzes existing style definitions
Shows diff of new vs existing tokens if project already has token files
Outputs structured design tokens in the user-selected format

testCases.query: Extract design context from this URL but I don't have Stitch MCP
expectedBehavior: Detects missing Stitch MCP and degrades to multimodal/CSS analysis
Falls back to WebFetch for URL HTML/CSS parsing
Still extracts colors, typography, spacing, and component patterns
Warns about reduced accuracy without Stitch MCP

testCases.query: Build a React component with a blue color scheme
expectedBehavior: Should NOT build components from a build/implement request
Should redirect to design-to-code or implement skill for building components
Does not run the extraction pipeline for implementation tasks
